Subject: Enron Management Committee Extended Meeting
Message:
Hi everyone -

It looks as though the best date for the Management Committee Extended Meeting is Wednesday, January 23 beginning at 12:00 noon and extending until approximately 5:00 p.m.  The meeting will be in 50M Dining Room and lunch will be provided.

Ken hopes that everyone will be able to attend.  Please let me know for planning purposes.

Rosie
